  "communicative_function": "The statement serves as an affirmation aimed at fostering a mindset of intrinsic motivation, self-acceptance, and authentic living.",

    "Inner function is more valuable than outer performance.",
    "Personal rhythm is more fulfilling than external rules.",
    "There is merit in adopting a slower, deeper approach to life.",
    "Being authentic does not require external validation or proof."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement possesses internal coherence as each part reinforces a common theme of valuing internal states and authenticity over external validation and conformity.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The individual valuing authenticity, seeking personal growth, capable of introspection, and open to challenging societal norms about success and performance.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The individual relying on external validation for self-worth, misunderstanding the statement as an excuse for inaction or irresponsibility, or feeling unable to align their values with the statement due to external pressures or obligations that demand performance."
}
